paper.title: Lyman-$\\alpha$ Observations of High Radial Velocity Low-Mass Stars Ross 1044 and Ross 825

extraction.summary: 本文利用HST/STIS观测了两颗高视向速度低质量星Ross 825 (K3) 和 Ross 1044 (M0)的Lyman-α发射线，利用它们的高视向速度(≥150 km/s)使Lyα线发生显著波长位移以绕过ISM和geocoronal污染。两颗星为已确认的银河系晕族低质量星，具有高视向速度但非超高速星候选体。论文主要贡献为建立低质量星的Teff-Lyα流量关系和GALEX UV-Lyα流量转换关系，不涉及HVS候选体的发现或分类。无HVS候选体。

method_chain.summary: HST/STIS G140M spectroscopy (1222 Å central wavelength). Lyα line profile fitting with Gaussian+H self-reversal model + ISM absorption model using emcee MCMC.
Gaia DR2 astrometry + GALEX UV photometry + 2MASS photometry for distance and stellar parameters. Empirical Teff-Lyα and GALEX-Lyα flux relations.

candidate_groups_considered.description: Ross 825 (K3) and Ross 1044 (M0), two high-RV halo stars used as Lyα observation targets. High RV enables Lyα line shift past ISM/geocoronal contamination, but neither star is an HVS/unbound candidate.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: Both stars are previously known low-mass halo stars with high radial velocities used as spectroscopic targets for Lyα measurements. Neither star is identified as a hypervelocity star or unbound candidate by the paper. The paper's focus is on Lyα flux calibration, not HVS discovery.
